title: How do I manage or cancel my active recurring subscription?
subtitle: Managing your automated billing cycles and cancellation.
content:
OVOSEC prioritizes consumer choice and transparency. To manage or cancel your automated billing cycles (processed securely via Curlec / Stripe Payments Malaysia):

  1. Log in to your personal account on our web portal.
  2. Navigate to Billing & Subscriptions under your Profile settings.
  3. Click the "Cancel Auto-Renewal" button. Your premium access will remain fully functional until the end of your current paid billing period, and no further charges will be applied.

title: What is your refund policy regarding premium packages?
subtitle: Refund conditions and the 7-day money-back guarantee.
content:
Due to the nature of digital transit services, we provide a strict yet fair 7-day money-back guarantee. You are eligible for a full refund if:

  • Your refund request is submitted within 7 calendar days of your initial purchase timestamp.
  • Your cumulative data consumption across all relay paths does not exceed 2.0 GB.

To initiate a request, please contact our support team at support@ovosec.com using your registered account email.

title: How do I register and log in to my account?
subtitle: Step-by-step guidance for account creation and authentication.
content: To register an account, navigate to our official website and select the LOGIN / REGISTER option. Provide a valid email address and configure a strong password to generate your user identity.

title: How do I perform a secure password reset?
subtitle: Recovering account access rights and password credentials.
content: If you forget your password, navigate to the Login Page and select 'Forgot Password'. Input your registered email address, and we will send a password reset verification link to restore your account access.

title: How do I check my remaining data quota and subscription expiration date?
subtitle: Monitoring your account usage and active billing cycle.
content:
OVOSEC prioritizes transparency. You can check your subscription status in two ways:

  • Via Web Portal: Log in to your personal dashboard on ovosec.com to view your active billing cycle and real-time data quota.
  • Via Client App: On the main interface of your OVOSEC utility, look at the bottom section or profile tab. The Hiddify engine automatically displays your cumulative data consumption and remaining days left (e.g., "Expires in X days"). Click the Refresh Icon to sync the latest usage from the billing server.

title: I changed or upgraded my device. How do I restore my active premium subscription?
subtitle: Restoring your active premium subscription on a new device.
content:
Your subscription is linked to your account profile, not a specific device hardware ID. To activate OVOSEC on your new device:

  1. Log in to your personal Dashboard on ovosec.com.
  2. Copy your unique Access Configuration URL.
  3. Install the OVOSEC utility on your new device, click "Import Configuration", and paste the URL. Your remaining premium days and data quota will instantly synchronize.

title: I completed my payment via Curlec/Stripe, but my client still shows "Free/Standard" status. What should I do?
subtitle: Resolving banking gateway transaction delays.
content:
Banking gateways occasionally experience temporary sync delays (usually between 1 to 5 minutes). If your status hasn鈥檛 updated:

  1. Go to the Profiles tab in your client application.
  2. Tap the menu icon next to your OVOSEC profile and click "Update Profile" to force a manual synchronization with our billing server.
  3. If it still doesn't reflect after 10 minutes, please email your transaction receipt to support@ovosec.com, and our billing team will credit your account manually.

title: When does my data quota reset, and what if I run out of data before the billing cycle ends?
subtitle: Understanding bandwidth reset schedules and top-ups.
content:
Your premium high-speed data quota resets automatically on your precise monthly billing anniversary date (viewable under your Web Dashboard). Data does not roll over to the next month.

If you exhaust your high-speed bandwidth prematurely due to heavy downloads, your connection will be rate-limited. You can instantly reset your quota by purchasing a data top-up or upgrading your plan tier through our secure web portal.

title: How will the OVOSEC subscription charge appear on my credit card or bank statement?
subtitle: Understanding billing descriptor representations on financial statements.
content:
To protect your financial privacy and maintain clear records, all transactions are securely processed under our licensed corporate identity.

On your credit card, debit card, or bank statement, the dynamic descriptor for this purchase will be clearly labeled as OVOSEC*KUALA LUMPUR or OVO CYBERTECH SDN BHD.

If you notice any billing discrepancies, please contact our support queue at support@ovosec.com before initiating a bank inquiry.
